original_statement: which team did the hawkeyes play the week after the iowa state game?
mutated_statement: which team did the home side play the week after the prior opponent game while simultaneously having no scheduled match that week?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Role shift + Contradictory condition insertion: Specific team name replaced by generic role (the hawkeyes → the home side) | Specific opponent generalized (iowa state → prior opponent) | Added simultaneous negation about scheduling creating a contradiction with "did play" (did play the week after → while simultaneously having no scheduled match that week)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从日志可识别的关键信息：critique 指出最初未使用表格函数且缺乏推理（"No reasoning steps..."），而 after_refine 和 judge_thought 明确给出基于日程检查的逻辑结论（声明在11月21之后没有空档周，因而不存在同时“有比赛”又“无赛程”的情形）。Agent 的具体表现为：在初始返回为空后进行了迭代修正，执行了行列抽取（f_select_row(row 11) -> f_select_column），并最终返回“none”同时给出基于日程连贯性的解释。该行为符合“逻辑解释合理化”：代理识别到指令自相矛盾，并通过查询与逻辑推理说明矛盾在数据上下文中无法成立，而非无视或盲目执行矛盾指令。
